Assembly: The assembly iyHylDila1.hap1.1 is based on 185x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 2 (17.6 - 20.1 Mbp) and on chromosome 1 (13.8 - 17.2 Mbp) are unknown. A large number of centromeric repeats is in the unlocalised sequences.
